tools.name: district.getDistrictEvents
tools.description: Gets a list of events in the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictEventsKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of event keys for events in the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictEventsSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of events in the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictRankings
tools.description: Gets a list of team district rankings for the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictsByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of districts and their corresponding district key, for the given year.

tools.name: district.getDistrictTeams
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictTeamsKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.

tools.name: district.getDistrictTeamsSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.

tools.name: event.getEvent
tools.description: Gets an Event.

tools.name: event.getEventAlliances
tools.description: Gets a list of Elimination Alliances for the given Event.

tools.name: event.getEventAwards
tools.description: Gets a list of awards from the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventDistrictPoints
tools.description: Gets a list of team rankings for the Event.

tools.name: event.getEventInsights
tools.description: Gets a set of Event-specific insights for the given Event.

tools.name: event.getEventMatches
tools.description: Gets a list of matches for the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventMatchesKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of match keys for the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventMatchesSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventMatchTimeseries
tools.description:
Gets an array of Match Keys for the given event key that have timeseries data. Returns an empty array if no matches have timeseries data.
*WARNING:* This is *not* official data, and is subject to a significant possibility of error, or missing data. Do not rely on this data for any purpose. In fact, pretend we made it up.
*WARNING:* This endpoint and corresponding data models are under *active development* and may change at any time, including in breaking ways.

tools.name: event.getEventOpRs
tools.description: Gets a set of Event OPRs (including OPR, DPR, and CCWM) for the given Event.

tools.name: event.getEventPredictions
tools.description: Gets information on TBA-generated predictions for the given Event. Contains year-specific information. *WARNING* This endpoint is currently under development and may change at any time.

tools.name: event.getEventRankings
tools.description: Gets a list of team rankings for the Event.

tools.name: event.getEventsByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of events in the given year.

tools.name: event.getEventsByYearKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of event keys in the given year.

tools.name: event.getEventsByYearSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of events in the given year.

tools.name: event.getEventSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form Event.

tools.name: event.getEventTeams
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventTeamsKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` keys that competed in the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventTeamsSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of `Team` objects that competed in the given event.

tools.name: event.getEventTeamsStatuses
tools.description: Gets a key-value list of the event statuses for teams competing at the given event.

tools.name: list.getTeamEventsStatusesByYear
tools.description: Gets a key-value list of the event statuses for events this team has competed at in the given year.

tools.name: match.getMatch
tools.description: Gets a `Match` object for the given match key.

tools.name: match.getMatchSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form `Match` object for the given match key.

tools.name: match.getMatchTimeseries
tools.description:
Gets an array of game-specific Match Timeseries objects for the given match key or an empty array if not available.
*WARNING:* This is *not* official data, and is subject to a significant possibility of error, or missing data. Do not rely on this data for any purpose. In fact, pretend we made it up.
*WARNING:* This endpoint and corresponding data models are under *active development* and may change at any time, including in breaking ways.

tools.name: match.getMatchZebra
tools.description: Gets Zebra MotionWorks data for a Match for the given match key.

tools.name: tba.getStatus
tools.description: Returns API status, and TBA status information.

tools.name: team.getTeam
tools.description: Gets a `Team` object for the team referenced by the given key.

tools.name: team.getTeamAwards
tools.description: Gets a list of awards the given team has won.

tools.name: team.getTeamAwardsByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of awards the given team has won in a given year.

tools.name: team.getTeamDistricts
tools.description: Gets an array of districts representing each year the team was in a district. Will return an empty array if the team was never in a district.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventAwards
tools.description: Gets a list of awards the given team won at the given event.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventMatches
tools.description: Gets a list of matches for the given team and event.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventMatchesKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of match keys for matches for the given team and event.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventMatchesSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given team and event.

tools.name: team.getTeamEvents
tools.description: Gets a list of all events this team has competed at.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventsByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of events this team has competed at in the given year.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventsByYearKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of the event keys for events this team has competed at in the given year.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventsByYearSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of events this team has competed at in the given year.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventsKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of the event keys for all events this team has competed at.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventsSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of all events this team has competed at.

tools.name: team.getTeamEventStatus
tools.description: Gets the competition rank and status of the team at the given event.

tools.name: team.getTeamMatchesByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of matches for the given team and year.

tools.name: team.getTeamMatchesByYearKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of match keys for matches for the given team and year.

tools.name: team.getTeamMatchesByYearSimple
tools.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given team and year.

tools.name: team.getTeamMediaByTag
tools.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team and tag.

tools.name: team.getTeamMediaByTagYear
tools.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team, tag and year.

tools.name: team.getTeamMediaByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team and year.

tools.name: team.getTeamRobots
tools.description: Gets a list of year and robot name pairs for each year that a robot name was provided. Will return an empty array if the team has never named a robot.

tools.name: team.getTeams
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects, paginated in groups of 500.

tools.name: team.getTeamsByYear
tools.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.

tools.name: team.getTeamsByYearKeys
tools.description: Gets a list Team Keys that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.

tools.name: team.getTeamsByYearSimple
tools.description: Gets a list of short form `Team_Simple` objects that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.

tools.name: team.getTeamSimple
tools.description: Gets a `Team_Simple` object for the team referenced by the given key.

tools.name: team.getTeamsKeys
tools.description: Gets a list of Team keys, paginated in groups of 500. (Note, each page will not have 500 teams, but will include the teams within that range of 500.)

tools.name: team.getTeamSocialMedia
tools.description: Gets a list of Media (social media) for the given team.

tools.name: team.getTeamsSimple
tools.description: Gets a list of short form `Team_Simple` objects, paginated in groups of 500.

tools.name: team.getTeamYearsParticipated
tools.description: Gets a list of years in which the team participated in at least one competition.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
